Research Identifiable Files

Availability of this file

Availability: 
Annual: 1999-2024
Monthly*: 2025 and 2026
*Data is only available to CCW VRDC users, and cannot be shipped.
The years listed reflect the most recent full year available from the CCW. OASIS Assessment data from CMS can typically be requested within three months of the target date.
Date Requests Can Be Accepted for Upcoming Releases: 
Annual: 2025 may be requested after 2/1/2027
Monthly: 2027 may be requested after
